characters.name: Alfie's Boss
characters.description: Alfie's BossCharacteristicsBreedPresa CanarioGenderMale♂EyesBlackFurCinereous (main coat),Black Cow (face mask),Black Cat (inner ears),Dust Storm (muzzle, head stripe, and belly),Flint (muzzle marking),Dusty Grey (eyebrows)MediaFirst AppearanceThe Quiet GameVoice ActorMarc Fennell Alfie's Bossis a minor character that has appeared inBluey. Alfie's Boss is an adult Presa Canario with light grey, dark grey, white, black, and charcoal fur. He has floppy ears. He has charcoal face markings and insides of ears, a black nose and eyes, a white muzzle side blaze and stomach, a dark grey muzzle, light grey feet, chest, parts on the head, eyebrows, and ears. He also wears a light red shirt with a name tag, although his name is not visible.

characters.name: Background characters
characters.description: "I'm missing a piece."This page isin need of content!You can help Bluey Wiki byadding information.Specifically:Missing characters from various episodes, including: Markets, The Sign, Dance Mode, Circus, Promises, Curry Quest, Fairytale, Explorers, Bob Bilby, and Cricket. Better images needed. A list ofbackground charactersthat have appeared inBluey. Characters with in-show names or voiced lines (or both) get their own articles. This list is only for characters who are unnamed and do not have voiced lines. Additionally, only names given in the series or official merchandise qualify, not those used only in production materials.

characters.name: Border Collie family
characters.description: TheBorder Collie familyis a family of Border Collies. They are a group of secondary characters that appear inBluey. It consists ofMackenzieandhisparents. The Border Collies are a family hailing from New Zealand who moved to Queensland, Brisbane; despite this, they (sans Mackenzie) are still massive supporters of theAll Blacks, the national rugby union team of New Zealand. Either some time after or before the birth ofMackenzie, he andhisparentsmoved to Brisbane. One time, as a toddler, Mackenzie almost lost his mother at a mall, leading to a sustained traumatic experience he wanted to face head-on - even pre-empting a game of Space he was playing withJackandRusty. WithCalypso's help, he was able to get over this traumatic experience.
